page_title: Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO | Teacher-Researcher & Management Expert
meta_description: Official website of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO, teacher-researcher and expert in marketing, management, regional integration and local development.
og_description: Teacher-Researcher, Consultant and Expert in marketing, management and local development.
twitter_description: Teacher-Researcher, Consultant and Expert in marketing, management and local development.
about_p1: For more than nineteen years, I have been involved in higher education, professional training, and strategic support for organizations in West Africa.
about_p2: My career lies at the crossroads of Anglophone African studies, regional integration, and organizational management, serving sustainable, inclusive, and results-oriented development.
expertise_item1_text: Analysis of integration dynamics in West Africa (ECOWAS, AfCFTA), regional governance and organizational performance in economic integration contexts.
expertise_item2_text: Design of marketing strategies and institutional communication, branding, resource mobilization and project promotion for public institutions and private organizations.
expertise_item3_text: Management of complex projects, strategic planning and results-based management serving local development, institutional growth and organizational performance.
metric1_label: years of experience in teaching, training and consulting
metric3_label: countries of intervention in Africa and internationally
contact_pitch: For any collaboration, academic intervention or strategic consulting request, I remain available for discussion.
